text.message: Let's have a clean and civilised bout shall we
One of these days I'll get that 10, haha
I'm guessing you mean yamyam, yeah
Nothing but respect for black country people. Deeply funny
Now be careful who you call that when you visit, haha
Looking right comfortable don't you orange
It's a region mostly known for Birmingham
I hung out in stourbridge a few times
You wouldn't settle that 9/11/10 would you orange?
It was a sign of goodwill
I had to take some brick, but I didn't want to mess up orange too bad
Could maybe have blocked the 10, because I've been catching the ire of blue a couple times
10 wood or 6 wheat was the block
Connecting those roads will make you unopposed too
Longest road yea but i have no ore
One of the good years played, too
Block doing a number on me, haha
Black you're not telling me you're holding onto 2+ VCs there, are you?
I didn't see they'd run out
You holding onto the last knight, orange?
He doesn't have access to ore
all those useless knights were a city
Those useless knights gave you better odds at VCs
Not a fan of overdrawing either
Look how nice I'm being to you blue
Especially after that mono, you sly dog
but army would have been better
But yeah, you are at 9 black, so either orange pulls it out next turn or it's a black win
are the 15 knights in a deck?
